retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the put on failure is an error-path action, not a retry scenario.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is enqueuing a received UDP packet (skb) into the socket's receive queue via __udp_enqueue_schedule_skb. The sk_skb_reason_drop call is only error handling on failure, not the main function. There is no reference count acquisition or initialization; only a conditional put on failure.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the put on failure is an error-path action, not a retry scenario.
